title: spigelia martiana
intro: Spigelia martiana, also known as Mexican prickly-poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Spigelia martiana include its ability to relieve anxiety and insomnia, reduce muscle spasms, and alleviate symptoms of malaria. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
